stages.concept:
# Unit 141: 감정을 나타내는 분사 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **감정을 나타내는 분사**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> The movie was **boring**. I was **bored**.
> 그 영화는 지루했다. 나는 지루했다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 감정 분사는 **-ing**와 **-ed** 형태가 달라요!

👩‍🏫 선생님: **-ing** — 감정을 **일으키는** (사물/상황에 사용)

> The game is **exciting**. (그 게임은 흥미진진하다.)
> The story is **interesting**. (그 이야기는 재미있다.)
> The news is **surprising**. (그 뉴스는 놀랍다.)

👩‍🏫 선생님: **-ed** — 감정을 **느끼는** (사람에 사용)

> I am **excited**. (나는 흥분했다.)
> She is **interested** in music. (그녀는 음악에 관심이 있다.)
> He was **surprised** at the news. (그는 그 뉴스에 놀랐다.)

👩‍🏫 선생님: 자주 쓰이는 감정 분사:

| -ing (일으키는) | -ed (느끼는) |
|------|------|
| boring (지루하게 하는) | bored (지루한) |
| exciting (흥미진진한) | excited (흥분한) |
| interesting (재미있는) | interested (관심 있는) |
| surprising (놀라운) | surprised (놀란) |
| disappointing (실망시키는) | disappointed (실망한) |
| confusing (혼란스러운) | confused (혼란스러워하는) |

**Q. 다음 문장의 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 단어를 고르세요.**
"She was completely (       ) after hearing the news." (그녀는 그 소식을 듣고 완전히 실망했다.)
1. disappointing
2. disappointed ✅
3. disappoints

👩‍🏫 선생님: 주어가 사람(She)이고 어떤 감정을 느꼈다는 수동의 의미이므로 -ed 형태인 disappointed를 써야 맞습니다!

🧑‍🎓 학생: -ing는 일으키는 쪽(사물), -ed는 느끼는 쪽(사람)! boring vs bored 잘 구별할게요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 141: 감정을 나타내는 분사 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 다음 중 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
His lecture is (     ) , so students are nodding off.
> **정답** boring

---

**02.** I am ? about the trip.
> **정답** excited

---

**03.** The story was really ? .
> **정답** touching (moving)

---

**04.** She looked ? at the result.
> **정답** disappointed

---

**05.** The game was ? .
> **정답** exciting

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
The students are boring in the class.
(학생들이 지루해한다)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** boring → bored

---

**07.** The movie was interested.
(영화가 재미있었다)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** interested → interesting

---

**08.** She is exciting about the party.
(그녀가 신이 나 있다)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** exciting → excited

---

**09.** The result was disappointed.
(결과가 실망스러웠다)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** disappointed → disappointing

---

**10.** He is confusing about the question.
(그가 혼란스러워한다)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** confusing → confused

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그 강의는 지루했다.
The lecture was .
> **정답** boring

---

**12.** 학생들은 지루해했다.
The students were .
> **정답** bored

---

**13.** 그 이야기는 감동적이었다.
The story was .
> **정답** moving (touching)

---

**14.** 나는 그 이야기에 감동받았다.
I was by the story.
> **정답** moved (touched)

---

**15.** 그 소식은 충격적이었다.
The news was .
> **정답** shocking

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그 영화는 재미있었다.
The movie interesting was
> **정답** The / movie / was / interesting

---

**17.** 나는 그 영화에 흥미를 느꼈다.
was I interested in the movie
> **정답** I / was / interested / in / the / movie

---

**18.** 그 게임은 흥미진진했다.
The game was exciting
> **정답** The / game / was / exciting

---

**19.** 나는 그 결과에 실망했다.
was I disappointed the by result
> **정답** I / was / disappointed / by / the / result

---

**20.** 그 질문은 혼란스러웠다.
The question confusing was
> **정답** The / question / was / confusing
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 141: 감정을 나타내는 분사 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
He felt __________ at the soccer game.
exciting
excited
excite
to excite
> **정답** excited

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
She seems really __________ about her son.
worrying
to worry
worries
worried
> **정답** worried

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
She was really __________ with her test results.
disappointed
disappoints
disappointing
to disappoint
> **정답** disappointed

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
The game was very __________, so I was
____________.
interesting - excited
interested - excited
interesting - exciting
interested - exciting
> **정답** interesting - excited

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
The news was very __________, so I was
____________.
shocked - shocked
shocking - shocked
shocking - shocking
shocked - shocking
> **정답** shocking - shocked

---

**06.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
The festival was very __________, so I was
____________.
boring - boring
bored - bored
bored - boring
boring - bored
> **정답** boring - bored

---

**07.** 빈칸에 들어갈 interest 의 형태가 다른 하나를 고르시오.
She read _________________ story about
robots.
He became _________________ in their
inventions.
He found the game very
___________________.
We would like to watch an
___________________ musical.
> **정답** He became _________________ in their inventions.

---

**08.** 빈칸에 들어갈 satisfy의 형태가 다른 하나를 고르시오.
He wants to get ___________ grades.
People were ___________ with the charity
event.
They were ___________ with the result.
The teacher was ___________ with my essay.
> **정답** He wants to get ___________ grades.

---

**09.** 빈칸에 들어갈 disappoint의 형태가 다른 하나를
고르시오.
It was ________________ results for us.
The movie wasn't successful because the
acting was _________________.
It was _________________ that he failed the
test.
My family and friends were _______________
with my failure
> **정답** My family and friends were _______________ with my failure

---

**10.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 잘못 쓰인 것을 고르시오.
His new book was bored.
I am interested in history.
The man looked surprised.
The baseball game was exciting.
> **정답** His new book was bored.

---

**11.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 잘못 쓰인 것을 고르시오.
All members were shocked at the news.
The World Cup soccer games were very
exciting.
The concert was boring so I fell asleep.
It's embarrassed when I have to ask people for
money.
> **정답** It's embarrassed when I have to ask people for money.

---

**12.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 잘못 쓰인 것을 고르시오.
She wanted to get an excited experience in
Italy.
The pictures she drew were interesting.
The man who received the gift looks satisfied.
She will show us some disappointing results.
> **정답** She wanted to get an excited experience in Italy.

---

**13.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 잘못 쓰인 것을 고르시오.
He is interested in studying history.
I was scared when I saw a man on the road.
It's amazing that he became a doctor.
It was shocked that he married Sally last
week.
> **정답** It was shocked that he married Sally last week.

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
I was excited at the results.
The baseball game was excited.
The news was surprising.
I was bored with the game.
> **정답** The baseball game was excited.

---

**15.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
His excited fans are really wild.
It is such a depressed day.
The movie you recommended to me was
really boring.
She told me a few interesting stories about AI.
> **정답** It is such a depressed day.

---

**16.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
I'm pleasing to meet you again.
I was surprised at the accident.
All of the questions he asked me were
confusing.
Her story is really boring.
> **정답** I'm pleasing to meet you again.

---

**17.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 모두 고르시오.
I felt embarrassing when he asked me out.
He showed me an interesting machine.
I got shocking to find he was very rich.
He was satisfied with the gift I gave him.
> **정답** I got shocking to find he was very rich., I felt embarrassing when he asked me out.

---

**18.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 문장을 모두 고르시오.
I was moved by the story.
She got some embarrassed questions from
students.
I tried to find something amazed in history.
This is really hard and tiring work.
> **정답** I tried to find something amazed in history., She got some embarrassed questions from students.

---

**19.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그는 그의 차가 도난당한 것을 알고 놀랐다.
He surprised to see his car stolen.
He was surprise to see his car stolen.
He was surprised to see his car stolen.
He was surprising to see his car stolen.
> **정답** He was surprised to see his car stolen.

---

**20.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
이것은 매우 걱정스러운 상황이다.
This is a very to worry situation.
This is a very worry situation.
This is a very worrying situation.
This is a very worried situation.
> **정답** This is a very worrying situation.
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 141 감정을 나타내는 분사중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 주어진 단어를 형태로 바꾸어 쓰시오.
All of the TV viewers were [surprise]  to hear
the news.
The news was [surprise] .
정답 surprised, surprising

---

**02.** 주어진 단어를 형태로 바꾸어 쓰시오.
The manager's instructions were [confuse] .
I was [confuse]  by the manager's instructions.
정답 confusing, confused

---

**03.** 주어진 단어를 형태로 바꾸어 쓰시오.
All the audience was [excite]  about the race.
The race was [excite]  to all the audience.
정답 excited, exciting

---

**04.** 주어진 단어를 형태로 바꾸어 쓰시오.
Some people are [depress]  by the rainy
weather.
The rainy weather is [depress]  to some people.
정답 depressed, depressing

---

**05.** 우리말과 같은 뜻이 되도록 주어진 단어를 이용하여
문장을 완성하시오.
많은 사람들은 그 사고에 충격을 받았다.
힌트 (     ) be, shock
  (     )   (     )   (     )  by the terrible
accident.
정답 Many, people, were, shocked

---

**06.** 우리말과 같은 뜻이 되도록 주어진 단어를 이용하여
문장을 완성하시오.
그녀의 연기는 실망스러웠다.
힌트 (     ) be, disappoint
Her performance  (     )   (     ) .
정답 was, disappointing

---

**07.** 우리말과 같은 뜻이 되도록 주어진 단어를 이용하여
문장을 완성하시오.
나는 요리를 하는 것에 흥미가 있다.
힌트 (     ) be, interest, in
I  (     )   (     )   (     )  cooking.
정답 am, interested, in

---

**08.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
My classmates were impressing by the story about
the old man.
→  (     )  about the
old man.
정답 My classmates were impressed by the story

---

**09.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
The loud noise was frightened to us.
→  (     )  to us.
정답 The loud noise was frightening

---

**10.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 찾아 완전한 문장으로 고쳐
쓰시오.
A) I was confused on the first day of the school.
B) My mother used to tell me interesting stories.
C) The singer's costume was really shocking.
D) Our presentation was quite satisfied to the
teacher.
정답 Our presentation was quite satisfying to the teacher.

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 141: 감정을 나타내는 분사 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
She felt __________ at the concert. exciting excited excite to excite
> 정답: excited

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
He seems really __________ about his daughter. worrying to worry worries worried
> 정답: worried

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
He was really __________ with his exam results. disappointed disappoints disappointing to disappoint
> 정답: disappointed

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
The show was very __________, so I was ____________.
interesting - excited interested - excited interesting - exciting interested - exciting
> 정답: interesting - excited

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
The story was very __________, so I was ____________.
shocked - shocked shocking - shocked shocking - shocking shocked - shocking
> 정답: shocking - shocked

---

**06.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
The lecture was very __________, so I was ____________.
boring - boring bored - bored bored - boring boring - bored
> 정답: boring - bored

---

**07.** 빈칸에 들어갈 interest 의 형태가 다른 하나를 고르시오.
He read an _________________ article about space.
She became _________________ in their experiments.
She found the show very ___________________.
We would like to see an ___________________ performance.
> 정답: She became _________________ in their experiments.

---

**08.** 빈칸에 들어갈 satisfy의 형태가 다른 하나를 고르시오.
She wants to get ___________ results.
People were ___________ with the fundraising event.
They were ___________ with the outcome.
The principal was ___________ with my speech.
> 정답: She wants to get ___________ results.

---

**09.** 빈칸에 들어갈 disappoint의 형태가 다른 하나를 고르시오.
It was ________________ news for us.
The play wasn't successful because the acting was _________________.
It was _________________ that she lost the match.
My classmates and teachers were _______________ with my performance.
> 정답: My family and friends were _______________ with my failure

---

**10.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 잘못 쓰인 것을 고르시오.
His new novel was bored.
I am interested in science.
The woman looked surprised.
The talent show was exciting.
> 정답: His new novel was bored.

---

**11.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 잘못 쓰인 것을 고르시오.
All students were shocked at the announcement.
The basketball games were very exciting.
The documentary was boring so I fell asleep.
It's embarrassed when I have to ask people for money. help.
> 정답: It's embarrassed when I have to ask people for money.

---

**12.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 잘못 쓰인 것을 고르시오.
He wanted to get an excited adventure in Australia.
The photos she took were interesting.
The boy who received the trophy looks satisfied.
She will share some disappointing results.
> 정답: He wanted to get an excited adventure in Australia.

---

**13.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 잘못 쓰인 것을 고르시오.
She is interested in learning music.
I was scared when I saw a spider on the wall.
It's amazing that she became a pilot.
It was shocked that he won the award last month.
> 정답: It was shocked that he won the award last month.

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
I was excited at the results.
The basketball game was excited.
The news was surprising.
I was bored with the documentary.
> 정답: The basketball game was excited.

---

**15.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
His excited supporters are really loud.
It is such a depressed morning.
The drama you recommended to me was really boring.
He told me a few interesting facts about whales.
> 정답: It is such a depressed morning.

---

**16.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
I'm pleasing to see you again.
I was surprised at the result.
All of the questions he asked me were confusing.
Her presentation is really boring.
> 정답: I'm pleasing to see you again.

---

**17.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 모두 고르시오.
I felt embarrassing when she asked me that.
He showed me an interesting gadget.
I got shocking to find she was very talented.
She was satisfied with the present I gave her.
> 정답: I got shocking to find he was very rich., I felt embarrassing when he asked me out.

---

**18.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 문장을 모두 고르시오.
I was moved by the speech.
He got some embarrassed questions from reporters.
I tried to find something amazed in science.
This is really hard and tiring work.
> 정답: I tried to find something amazed in history., She got some embarrassed questions from students.

---

**19.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그녀는 그녀의 가방이 도난당한 것을 알고 놀랐다.
She surprised to see her bag stolen.
She was surprise to see her bag stolen.
She was surprised to see her bag stolen.
She was surprising to see her bag stolen.
> 정답: She was surprised to see her bag stolen.

---

**20.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
이것은 매우 당황스러운 상황이다.
This is a very to embarrass situation.
This is a very embarrass situation.
This is a very embarrassing situation.
This is a very embarrassed situation.
> 정답: This is a very embarrassing situation.
